name: command-demo
visual_summary: The Command Demo component, a versatile utility, typically employed in interactive scenarios. It facilitates the presentation of command prompts, instructions, or guidelines, often accompanied by icons and action-oriented elements. Developers would utilize this component to improve user experience and streamline navigation.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: command-demo
Description: The Command Demo component, a versatile utility, typically employed in interactive scenarios. It facilitates the presentation of command prompts, instructions, or guidelines, often accompanied by icons and action-oriented elements. Developers would utilize this component to improve user experience and streamline navigation.
Style: material-design, minimal, flat
Interactions: clickable, tappable, draggable, scrollable
Tags: interactive, utility, scenarios, commands, guidelines, icons, action-oriented

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
